name: eXmotion Co., Ltd.
summary: eXmotion Co., Ltd. provides technical consulting and education services for systems and software. It offers project diagnosis and site support services; and practical courses to acquire skilled skills that can be used on site. In addition, the company provides eXquto, a diagnostic tool for C language that diagnoses software design and implementation quality; MODEL EVALUATOR, a tool to diagnose the quality of MATLAB/Simulink model; and Mtrip, a tool for mutually converting an architectural design model described in a general-purpose modeling language. eXmotion Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
